calendar.matters:
HEARING FOR THE RELEASE OF RECORDS
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE THE RELEASE OF RECORDS

Appearances:
J. Kevin Morrison of Altair Law (415.988.9828, kmorrison@altairlaw.com) appearing for plaintiffs.
No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The court has reviewed in camera the subpoena return by AT&T and releases the records in whole to plaintiffs. The records are probative of whether defendant was making or receiving cell phone calls at the time of the incident, and the records do not contain any contents of communications. While the records contain cell phone numbers that were in contact with defendant's cell phone number, no names are included, mitigating privacy concerns.

The court provides Mr. Morrison with two envelopes, one that includes documents and the other with a USB drive. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion For A Protective Order, Defendant Mirabelle Hwang'S Motion For A Protective Order, Declaration Of Steven Sobieraj
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MIRABELLE HWANG'S Motion For A Protective Order.

Appearances:
J. Kevin Morrison, Esq., of Altair Law LLP. (415) 988-9828, for Plaintiffs.

Steven Sobieraj, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, Law Office of Ann Marie Defelice, (818) 956-9100, for Defendant.

The matter is discussed. At conclusion of discussion the court adopts a modified tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Mirabelle Hwang's motion for protective order is granted in part and continued in part. The court sets a hearing for the release of records for May-06-2026 at 9:00 am in Dept. 301. See scanned court order for additional ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
